data.name: Entry_Copy_RoundParticipantsCountMissing
data.value: The current event does not have a round participants count set.

data.name: Entry_Copy_PreviousEventMustBeOfficial
data.value: The previous event must have OFFICIAL status.

data.name: Entry_Copy_NoFinishersWithTime
data.value: The previous event has no finishers with a recorded time.

data.name: Entry_Copy_EventNotFound_Format
data.value: Event with Id {0} was not found.

data.name: Heat_Number_MinOne
data.value: Heat number must be at least 1.

data.name: Heat_Save_SwimEventNotFound_Format
data.value: Event {0} was not found.

data.name: Heat_Save_HeatNotFound_Format
data.value: Heat {0} was not found.

data.name: Heat_Validation_MaxPositions_Format
data.value: A heat cannot have more than {0} positions (lanes {1}).

data.name: Heat_Validation_DuplicateLane_Format
data.value: Lane {0} is specified more than once.

data.name: Heat_Validation_DuplicateEntry_Format
data.value: Entry {0} is specified more than once.

data.name: Heat_Validation_LaneOutOfRange_Format
data.value: Lane {0} is outside the range {1}.

data.name: Heat_Validation_EntryNotInEvent_Format
data.value: Entry {0} does not belong to the event.

data.name: Heat_Validation_EntryAlreadyInOtherHeat_Format
data.value: Entry {0} is already assigned to another heat.

data.name: Heat_Approve_PositionsMissing
data.value: Heat positions were not provided.

data.name: Heat_Approve_NoResultForEntry_Format
data.value: No result data provided for entry {0}.

data.name: Heat_Approve_NotAllLaneResultsProvided
data.value: Not all lane results are provided.

data.name: ReportExport_NoSwimEventsSelected
data.value: No swim events selected.

data.name: ReportExport_OutputPathEmpty
data.value: Output file path is empty.

data.name: ReportExport_NoReportsSelected
data.value: No reports selected.

data.name: ReportExport_NoAgeGroupsSelected
data.value: No age groups selected.
